name: SpiralBeam.ErrorStatus
summary: Define possible statuses for geometry creation/modification commands.

enum_values.name: DataMissing
enum_values.summary: Status when some part data is missing.

enum_values.name: DefinitionPointsTooClose
enum_values.summary: Status when definition points are too close.

enum_values.name: DefinitionPointsCannotBeAligned
enum_values.summary: Status when definition points are on line with sweep direction.

enum_values.name: ZeroTotalRiseWithMore360Degrees
enum_values.summary: Status when total rise is zero and rotation angle more than 360 degrees.

enum_values.name: RotationAngleIs0Degrees
enum_values.summary: Status when rotation angle is 0 degrees.

enum_values.name: InvalidGeometry
enum_values.summary: Status when helix has invalid geometry.
